candidate_definition_hints.text: Draw pretty micro benchmarking charts in HTML and allow to export them as png for benchee

Formatter for [benchee](//github.com/PragTob/benchee) to produce some standalone HTML with nice graphs, a data table etc. from your benchee benchmarking results :) Also allows you to export PNG images, the graphs are also somewhat explorable thanks to [plotly.js](https://plot.ly…
